panels.title: Skill State Distribution Over Time
panels.description: Stacked count of skill_state_transition events bucketed by destination state. Source: src/donna/skills/lifecycle.py.

panels.title: Evolution Success Rate per Skill
panels.description: Ratio of skill_evolution_outcome events with outcome=success to total attempts, grouped by skill. Source: src/donna/skills/evolution_scheduler.py.

targets.expr: sum by (skill_id) (count_over_time({container_name="donna-orchestrator"} | json | event="skill_evolution_outcome" | outcome="success" [$__interval])) / sum by (skill_id) (count_over_time({container_name="donna-orchestrator"} | json | event="skill_evolution_outcome" [$__interval]))

panels.title: Nightly Cron Outcomes
panels.description: Summary rows from the nightly skill-system cron: detector, evolution, drafter, degradation, correction-cluster, and aggregate. Source: src/donna/skills/crons/nightly.py.

panels.title: Cost Breakdown by Skill
panels.description: Per-skill LLM cost from invocation_log. Only rows with skill_id populated are included. NOTE: currently wired for forward-looking data — the skill executor does not yet write to invocation_log (see Wave 3 commit note).

targets.rawSql: SELECT datetime((strftime('%s', timestamp) / 3600) * 3600, 'unixepoch') AS time, skill_id, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM invocation_log WHERE skill_id IS NOT NULL AND timestamp >= $__timeFrom AND timestamp < $__timeTo GROUP BY time, skill_id ORDER BY time;
